etymology.description: äşĽ (gather) + ĺ†Š (book) = gather books, implying order
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn, 'phonetic') conveys the concept of gathering or organizing books, reflecting an idea of orderliness or sequence. This is achieved by combining the imagery of a group (äşĽ) with books (ĺ†Š).
